description: Local community-ran meetup for developers interested in learning and practicing on AI, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Data Science, and Cloud topics.Our goal is to congregate with AI enthusiasts from all over Hyderabad to learn and practice AI tech, through tech talks, workshops, bootcamps, etc..
